name: Codexbar
description:
Show AI provider usage metrics in the GNOME panel. Based on codexbar by @steipete.

Now support additional providers:
- Claude
- Codex
- Gemini
- more!
ai_report:
Flagged Audit Notes:
The code has some minor issues and warnings, but no critical security vulnerabilities were found. The issues are related to the use of synchronous DBus/file operations, deprecated APIs, and style issues.

Issues:
- secret.js:23 [warning]: The Secret.password_store_sync function is a synchronous DBus operation and may block the main thread. Consider using the asynchronous version instead.
- secret.js:35 [warning]: The Secret.password_lookup_sync function is a synchronous DBus operation and may block the main thread. Consider using the asynchronous version instead.
- secret.js:47 [warning]: The Secret.password_clear_sync function is a synchronous DBus operation and may block the main thread. Consider using the asynchronous version instead.
- adapters/SoupApiFetcher.js:123 [warning]: The Soup.Session.timeout property is deprecated since Soup 3.0. Consider using the Soup.Session.timeout-seconds property instead.
- prefs.js:345 [warning]: The Gio.app_info_launch_default_for_uri function is deprecated since GNOME 43. Consider using the Gio.AppInfo.launch_default_for_uri function instead.
